'''Slizzik''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Barabel/Legends|Barabel]], and the mate of [[Balluzikik]]. While working together with the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Slimego]] and the [[Taloron Hunters|Taloron Hunter]] [[Crutag]], Slizzik pursued a bounty posted on a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] agents. The chase leads them to the jungle world of [[Trinta]] where the maddened [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Halagad Ventor]] resided. Ventor, used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to take control of the [[Starship/Legends|starships]] of both the hunters and the hunted, and crash-landed them on the surface of the planet. Even though both she and Slimego were prepared to forego a larger [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] and deliver the agents dead, Crutag insisted on capturing the Rebels alive. The Alliance agents, however, managed to actually capture their pursuers instead and left them stranded on the swamps of Trinta.

==Appearances==
*''[[Domain of Evil]]'' {{Reprint|Domain of Evil}} {{1st}}
